title: mimulus glabratus var. geyeri
intro: Mimulus glabratus var. geyeri, also known as Geyer's monkey flower, is a plant species in the family Phrymaceae. It is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing stress and anxiety, and it has been used to treat various conditions, including insomnia and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Geyer's monkey flower include teas, tinctures, and salves, which are made by infusing the plant's flowers, leaves, or roots in a solvent.
